positive: A minimalist, highly stylized abstract depiction of a nocturnal forest scene. Focus on a central, elegant silhouette of a majestic deer drinking at a moonlit puddle. The surrounding woods should be rendered in clean, solid black lines and shapes against a deep midnight blue gradient. Incorporate stylized, geometric floral patterns (like stylized ferns and blossoms) that frame the deer and puddle. Use strong contrasts, giving the appearance of a negative-space woodcut or tattoo design. High contrast, intricate line work, vector art style, limited color palette (black, white, midnight blue), perfect for screen printing on apparel, clean edges, suitable for repeating pattern element.
negative: blurry, low contrast, photograph, real photo, noisy, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, trademark, signature, excessive detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, discolored, complex background, gradients (too many)
